latest_commit.message:
⚡ Bolt: [performance improvement] (#154)

💡 What: Replaced sequential await operations with chunked concurrent
execution (chunk size of 10) using Promise.all() in webhook retries.
🎯 Why: To prevent O(N) network blocking and drastically speed up
processing failed webhooks.
📊 Impact: Reduces webhook retry processing time from O(N) to O(N/10),
significantly improving backend efficiency.
🔬 Measurement: Run a stress test triggering numerous webhook failures,
then invoke retryFailedWebhooks and measure the duration.

---
*PR created automatically by Jules for task
[17317787770745039164](https://jules.google.com/task/17317787770745039164)
started by @pinkycollie*

---------

Co-authored-by: google-labs-jules[bot] <161369871+google-labs-jules[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

Release notes

Sourced from postcss's releases.

8.5.14

  • Fixed custom syntax regression (by @​43081j).

8.5.13

  • Fixed postcss-scss commend regression.

8.5.12

  • Fixed reading any file via user-generated CSS.
  • Added opts.unsafeMap to disable checks.

8.5.11

  • Fixed nested brackets parsing performance (by @​offset).
Changelog

Sourced from postcss's changelog.

8.5.14

  • Fixed custom syntax regression (by @​43081j).

8.5.13

  • Fixed postcss-scss commend regression.

8.5.12

  • Fixed reading any file via user-generated CSS.
  • Added opts.unsafeMap to disable checks.

8.5.11

  • Fixed nested brackets parsing performance (by @​offset).
